About
NL
🎓 Undergraduate
⚡ Open to Work

Passionate about building meaningful things

I'm a Computer Engineering undergraduate specialising in networking and embedded systems. I enjoy working at the intersection of hardware and software — from configuring routers to writing full-stack web apps.

When I'm not coding, I'm exploring the latest in protocol design, tinkering with microcontrollers, or writing about what I learn.

C / C++PythonJavaScriptReactNetworkingEmbeddedLinuxDocker
